name: ScreenshotOne
description: ScreenshotOne — REST API for capturing screenshots of URLs with custom viewport, JS execution, and delay.

seo.title: ScreenshotOne — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: ScreenshotOne: ScreenshotOne — REST API for capturing screenshots of URLs with custom viewport, JS execution, and delay.

when_to_use: REST API for capturing website screenshots at any viewport
Automated URL screenshot generation for link previews
OG image generation from live URLs for social media sharing
Browser automation screenshots without managing Puppeteer infra
Batch screenshot generation for website monitoring tools

pros: Simple REST API with rich rendering options
Viewport, JS execution, and delay controls
Blocks ads and cookie banners automatically
cons: Thin compared to Browserless for full automation
Rate limits on lower tiers are tight
review.verdict: Clean screenshot API for OG images, thumbnails, and reports, pick Browserless if you need full browser control.
review.best_for: Generating OG images, PDF previews, or periodic site snapshots via API
review.not_for: Complex browser automation, scraping, or end-to-end testing workflows
